## [33:31 - 36:33]

when someone, the way it works is like, I have, let's just say the difference between the welcome email list and the card abandonment email list. So the welcome email list is set up to say, hey, when someone enters their email on our boom club opt-in page or on our exit intent pop-up or on our layover that happens when they have been on the website for 20 seconds or maybe through an email lead generation ad campaign, when someone enters their email address in any one of those places, automatically put them into this automation flow and begin sending them emails. But if they are in the abandon cart email sequence, do not send them emails. And then the abandon cart email sequence says, hey, put someone in this, put someone in this abandon cart email flow, if they abandoned the shopping cart while they were, you know, if they entered their email address, when they added something to their cart and then they abandoned it, put them in this flow. And so since the first one says, hey, if they get added to the abandon cart email flow, stop sending them emails, then the abandon cart one works just fine because as soon as they get put in there, it stops them on the first one. And it's called smart filtering and literally every email service provider has it. Yep, that's perfect. Yeah, and that's so, so important.
